lanes.peer_cpu: Peer CpuBackend with optimized CPU/SIMD dispatch, no metal feature
lanes.peer_metal: Peer CpuBackend with the real metal feature and a required Metal device
lanes.zig_metal: stwo-zig Native Metal functional protocol with zero CPU fallback

measurement.interleaving: balanced four-lane rotation per size and round

protocols.peer: Blake2sM31Channel/Blake2sM31MerkleChannel with PcsConfig::default(); concrete security, FRI, PoW, commitment, and proof-size values retained per sample

required: peer CPU equals peer Metal at every size
stwo-zig CPU equals stwo-zig Metal at every size

publication.empty_series_meaning: not calibrated; never infer parity or a performance milestone
